items.title: [CISA KEV] BerriAI LiteLLM - BerriAI LiteLLM Command Injection Vulnerability
items.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-42271
廠商: BerriAI
產品: LiteLLM
漏洞名稱: BerriAI LiteLLM Command Injection Vulnerability
說明: BerriAI LiteLLM contains a command injection vulnerability that could allow any authenticated user, including holders of low-privilege internal-user keys, to run arbitrary commands on the host.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
修補截止日: 2026-06-22
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown
reference_urls: This vulnerability affects a common open-source component, third-party library, or a protocol used by different products. Please check with specific vendors for information on patching status. For more information, please see: https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/security/advisories/GHSA-v4p8-mg3p-g94g ; https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/releases/tag/v1.83.7-stable ; https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42271

items.title: [CISA KEV] Check Point Security Gateway - Check Point Security Gateway Improper Authentication Vulnerability
items.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-50751
廠商: Check Point
產品: Security Gateway
漏洞名稱: Check Point Security Gateway Improper Authentication Vulnerability
說明: Check Point Security Gateway contains an improper authentication vulnerability in IKEv1 key exchange that could allow an unauthenticated remote attacker to bypass user authentication and establish a remote access VPN connection without a valid user password.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
修補截止日: 2026-06-11
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown
